case_title: RUSSELL BRIMER VS. DONA'S HALLMARK et al

docket_entries.description: BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-03-2005 CONTINUED TO JAN-03-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OCT-03-2005 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-19-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-03-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-19-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIMER, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT DONA'S HALLMARK DOES 1 THROUGH 150 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-19-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-16-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-04-2005

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIMER, RUSSELL SERVED JUL-18-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DONA'S HALLMARK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-03-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
